metadata.description: PsyReaSFX is a high-performance sound asset browser, audition, waveform, metadata, region, collection, REAPER insertion, and Transfer workflow.

version.name: 0.7.9-beta.12
version.author: Psysia
version.changelog: - Replaces the compressed toolbar image with a crisp vector brand mark. - Bundles Orbitron for the PsyReaSFX wordmark with a safe font fallback. - Makes toolbar icons borderless at rest and highlighted on interaction. - Places the navigation and inspector toggles beside their respective panels. - Rewrites the README and bilingual user guides as product documentation.
